headline: Here’s Why You Don’t Bet Against This Dividend King
summary: Markets have delivered plenty of twists lately, with inflation cooling but growth uneven and volatility still lurking around every earnings corner. Smart investors know one truth holds steady: reliable income beats hype every time. That is why you should consider owning a healthcare giant that has raised its dividend through recessions, pandemics, and patent cliffs ... Here’s Why You Don’t Bet Against This Dividend King

headline: Is Merck (MRK) Still Attractively Priced After A 36% One Year Share Price Gain
summary: If you are wondering whether Merck is still reasonably priced after a strong run, or if the share price has moved ahead of its fundamentals, this breakdown will help you frame that question clearly. Merck closed at US$118.10, with returns of 2.1% over the last week, a 4.6% decline over the last month, and gains of 10.9% year to date and 36.4% over the last year. Recent headlines around Merck have focused on its position in the pharmaceuticals sector and how its pipeline and product portfolio...

headline: Lupin Receives Tentative Approval from U.S. FDA for Sugammadex Injection
summary: Global pharma major, Lupin Limited (Lupin) (BSE: 500257) (NSE: LUPIN) (REUTERS: LUPIN.BO) (BLOOMBERG: LPCIN) today announced that it has received tentative approval from the United States Food and Drug Administration (U.S. FDA) for its Abbreviated New Drug Application for Sugammadex Injection, 200 mg/2 mL (100 mg/mL) and 500 mg/5 mL (100 mg/mL) Single-Dose Vial.
